proofs: destruct enum_function_symbols as [ef ef_spec], enum_constant_symbols as [ec ec_spec]. induction t; eauto.

attempts: destruct (gen_trm_good t (trm_depth t) (le_n (trm_depth t))) as [s Hs]. destruct (cp_surj (trm_depth t, s)) as [x Hx]. exists x. unfold enum_trm. rewrite Hx. exact Hs.
destruct (gen_trm_good t (trm_depth t) (le_n (trm_depth t))) as [s Hs]. exists (Nat.pair (trm_depth t) s). unfold enum_trm. now rewrite Nat.unpair_pair.
destruct (gen_trm_spec t) as [rk [seed H]]. destruct (cp_surj (rk, seed)) as [x Hx]. refine (exist _ x _). unfold enum_trm. rewrite Hx. exact H.
destruct (gen_trm_good t (trm_depth t) (le_n (trm_depth t))) as [seed H]. destruct (cp_surj (trm_depth t) seed) as [n Hcp]. exists n. unfold enum_trm. rewrite Hcp. simpl. exact H.
destruct (gen_trm_good t (trm_depth t) (le_n _)) as [seed H]. destruct (cp_surj (trm_depth t, seed)) as [x Hx]. exists x. unfold enum_trm. rewrite Hx. exact H.

induction t as [v| f args IH | c] using trm_ind.
- destruct (cp_surjective 0 v) as [x Hx]. exists x; unfold enum_trm; rewrite Hx; reflexivity.
- destruct (enum_function_symbols.(enum_spec) f) as [m Hm]. induction args as [| n t' ts IHts] using trms_ind.
-- destruct (cp_surjective (S 0) m) as [x Hx]. exists x; unfold enum_trm; rewrite Hx; simpl; rewrite Hm; reflexivity.
-- destruct (IH t') as [xt Hxt]. destruct IHts as [xs Hxs]. destruct (cp_surjective (S n) (cp xt xs)) as [x Hx]. exists x; unfold enum_trm; rewrite Hx; simpl; rewrite Hm, Hxt, Hxs; reflexivity.
- destruct (enum_constant_symbols.(enum_spec) c) as [n Hn]. destruct (cp_surjective 1 n) as [x Hx]. exists x; unfold enum_trm; rewrite Hx; simpl; rewrite Hn; reflexivity.
destruct enum_function_symbols as [ef ef_spec], enum_constant_symbols as [ec ec_spec]. induction t; eauto.
